title: Pouvoirs

pages.text:
IRELAND

CONVENTION FOR THE PROTECTION OF THE MARINE ENVIRONMENT OF THE

NORTH EAST ATLANTIC

WHEREAS a CONVENTION FOR THE PROTECTION OF THE MARINE

ENVIRONMENT OF THE NORTH EAST ATLANTIC has been concluded;

AND WHEREAS the said Convention is open for signature at paris from 22 September, 1992 to 30 June, 1993 by the contracting parties to the Oslo Convention or the Paris Convention;

AND WHEREAS Ireland is such a State;

AND WHEREAS the Government of Ireland have seen the said

Convention and judged it appropriate that it should be signed, subject to ratification, on behalf of Ireland;

NOW, THEREFORE, I , David Andrews, I.D., Minister for Foreign

Affairs of Ireland, do by these presents Hereby authorise and empower

Michael Smith, T.D.,

Minister for the Environment of Ireland to sign, subject to ratification, the said CONVENTION FOR THE

PROTECTION OF THE ENVIRONMENT OF THE NORTH EAST ATLANTIC on behalf of Ireland.

GIVEN AT DUBLIN under my Official Seal this the 15th day of

September, 1992,

pin

Minister for Foreign Affairs of Ireland

Déclaration finale de la Réunion ministérielle des Commissions d'Oslo et de Paris, 21-22 septembre 1992
